name: starter-swarm
description: One coordinator, three workers, per-stream budgets. The 'streams' map uses the same shape as agent-payments-guard's caps.json, so this file can double as the guard's caps file.

workers.name: research-worker
workers.job: gather sources and summarize — never publishes

workers.name: content-worker
workers.job: draft posts and pages — never sends

workers.name: ops-worker
workers.job: run maintenance scripts, propose infra spend — never approves it
